# Top 100 Dolby Atmos Movies

*Auto-generated by [`scoring/score.py`](../scoring/score.py) from 333 ranked films across all sources. Do not hand-edit.*

See [docs/methodology.md](../docs/methodology.md) for how scores are calculated.

*11 film(s) captured in sources were excluded from this ranking because they don't have a Dolby Atmos mix. See [`../scoring/excluded.txt`](../scoring/excluded.txt).*
